prompt: Add a celebratory feel to DoneScreen — animate stats counting up, add entry animations using flutter_animate. Keep minimal editorial style, no colorful confetti.

assertions.text: Uses flutter_animate (.animate() with .fadeIn() or .moveY() or similar) for entry animations
Checks MediaQuery.of(context).disableAnimations (respects accessibility reduced motion setting)
Multiple elements use staggered animation delays (e.g., delay: 200.ms, delay: 400.ms) for sequential reveals
References AppTextStyles.* (no inline TextStyle with raw font sizes)
No colorful accent colors (Colors.yellow, Colors.confetti, Colors.green for 'success', etc.) — stays monochromatic
Stats or numbers have some form of animation (counting up, fade in, or slide in)
